scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn backend.app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload; else python -m uvicorn backend.app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload; fi'" "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
